description_long: This is a single-story modern bungalow with a flat roof and a clean, geometric design. The exterior walls are predominantly white, with large windows on the front facade allowing ample natural light into the interior. The front features a small balcony or porch area with glass railings and potted plants, adding a touch of greenery. The interior layout is visible, showing multiple rooms with patterned accent walls in black, white, and purple. The structure sits on a rectangular green base, simulating a lawn or garden area. The overall appearance is minimalist, with a focus on straight lines and functional spaces.
description: A modern, single-story white bungalow with a flat roof, large front windows, and a small balcony or porch area, set on a green lawn base.
description_view_0: The left side of the bungalow is visible, showing a single window and a partial view of the interior rooms with patterned walls.
description_view_1: The rear side is shown, with minimal window openings and a clear view of the interior room divisions and accent wall patterns.
description_view_2: The front facade is visible, featuring large windows, a glass-railed balcony or porch, and potted plants, highlighting the main entrance.
description_view_3: The right side is shown, with a mostly solid wall and a glimpse of the interior layout, including patterned accent walls and some interior decor.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large front-facing windows and smaller side windows
